evals.prompt: Add the Today and Curriculum screens for the Solo Wrestler MVP. Use Ionic Angular standalone routes and keep the folder structure feature-based.
evals.expected_output: Creates or proposes files under src/app/features/training/pages/today and src/app/features/training/pages/curriculum, keeps app root limited to shell/routing, and uses lazy standalone routes.

evals.prompt: Where should I put a workout progress store, curriculum data, and a generic stat tile component in this app?
evals.expected_output: Places workout progress and curriculum concepts under the training feature or core storage depending on responsibility, and only places the generic presentational stat tile in shared.

evals.prompt: Refactor the existing Ionic Angular app so the active workout drill card, timer controls, and in-app YouTube modal are organized cleanly without over-migrating unrelated files.
evals.expected_output: Keeps drill-card and timer UI near src/app/features/training/pages/active-workout when page-private, puts reusable timer/video infrastructure under core when app-wide, and avoids unrelated broad restructuring.
